name: dwi2trx
description: Browser-only diffusion MRI pipeline: load DWI, fit the tensor, track streamlines, save TRX. No data leaves your machine.

scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types src/dwi2trx/validate.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/dwi2trx/dtifit.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/lib/nifti-geometry.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/dwi2trx/niimath-sform.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/dwi2trx/tracking/backoff.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/dwi2trx/tracking/nifti-read.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/dwi2trx/tracking/tracking.test.ts
